description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light surfaces, with large rectangular windows dominating the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes a driveway leading to a garage, as well as a small landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs. A balcony with a metal railing extends from the upper floor, providing outdoor space above the garage. The main entryway is recessed and partially sheltered, with a paved walkway leading to the front door. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior surfaces, featuring a garage, balcony, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, garage door, balcony, and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the boundary wall extending along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows, the balcony, and the enclosed backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage, driveway, and more of the yard and boundary wall visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved walkway, partially sheltered, and minimal decorative elements
